name: Tenant meeting terminology library
scope: Human review of AI term candidates
requiresEnv: Project-local meeting terminology data source ID

dataIsolation.guard: Terms, aliases, candidate sources, recordings, users and credentials remain in the target tenant.

changes: AI candidate-term hook after meeting processing
Approved terms only are eligible for transcription prompts
definitionOfDone: Approved terms are injected only for their own tenant
AI candidates start pending human confirmation
Disabled or rejected terms are not injected
No tenant terms or secrets are copied into AM Core
